headline: Freeze lifts; harvest radishes before Monday heat
weather_notes: Freeze Warning active until noon today — confirm frost cloth is covering peas and strawberries.
39°F low tonight — borderline for frost-sensitive plants, keep row covers in place overnight.
Sunny 75–82°F stretch Sun–Tue after 4 days without watering — plan to irrigate this weekend.

suggested_tasks.title: Harvest radishes before heat triggers bolting
suggested_tasks.description: 18-Day French radishes hit expected harvest Apr 20; Monday's 81°F will trigger bolting if left in ground.

suggested_tasks.title: Inspect snap peas for aphids
suggested_tasks.description: Aphid inspection was due yesterday and is overdue; warming temps this week accelerate pest pressure.
